{{Infobox group
| name = Luminian Order
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Luminian Order Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian]] [[Order]] is one of the four [[Independent Guilds]] within the [[Aurelian Empire]]. Founded by a woman named [[Loreli]], the organization is centered around the worship of an [[Unknown God]] and utilizes the [[White Sun]] as its primary symbol. [[The Order]]'s headquarters, known as [[Hightower]], is a fortified location situated near the [[Capital]] that possesses a protective [[aura]] of peace and tranquility developed over centuries. The organization is currently led by [[Jameson Allbright]]. [[The Order]] is composed of various ranks and roles, including silver-armored [[Knights]] and [[Pilgrims]], the latter of whom are distinguished by their all-white clothing and silver medallions. While many members serve as dedicated, monk-like servants, the [[Order]] also possesses individuals with [[Soulbound]] abilities. However, strict regulations govern these members; they must undergo years of service and demonstrate their capabilities through medical and alchemical healing rather than relying solely on supernatural powers. Historically, the Luminians have been characterized by their opposition to the [[Great Elders]] and their cults, having successfully eliminated the followers of the [[Dead Mother]] centuries ago. While they have been known to lead humanity into conflict in the past, more recent eras have seen them preaching peace. In current political climates, they maintain alliances with other [[Independent Guilds]], such as the [[Architects]], to provide security and support. Despite their influence, the [[Order]] has recently faced challenges including being stretched thin due to combat losses and the difficulty of replacing their knights.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Luminian Order]] uses the [[White Sun]] crest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Luminian Order]] is associated with the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Luminian Order]] and the [[Blackwatch]] are in conflict.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jameson Allbright]] is the Head of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Luminian Order]] is a group that performs rituals similar to what [[Andel]] witnessed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Luminian Order]] is one of the groups mobilized by [[the Emperor]] to deal with [[Elder]] activity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Luminian Order]] encourages hatred of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|After previously leading humanity into conflict, the [[Luminian]] [[Order]] transitioned into a merciful clerical organization dedicated to preaching peace. The order maintains specialized smiths who have undergone training by the [[Alchemist's Guild]]. Despite this connection, the order opposes the right of the [[Guilds]] to select a new [[Emperor]]. During the events involving [[Shera]], many members of the order demanded her immediate execution.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian Order]] began preaching peace after once leading humanity to war.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian Order]] has smiths trained by the [[Alchemist's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian Order]] does not support the right of the [[Guilds]] to choose a new [[Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian Order]] is a merciful clerical order.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Many members of the [[Luminian Order]] called for [[Shera]]'s immediate execution.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As one of the four [[Independent Guilds]], the [[Luminian]] [[Order]] operates as a highly disciplined and organized group composed of [[Pilgrims]] and knights clad in silver. Headquartered within the greater [[Capital]] area, the organization maintains strict regulations regarding which [[Pilgrims]] are permitted to wield the full power of a [[Soulbound]]. During the conflict, the [[Order]] provides support to the [[Independents]] while actively pursuing [[Andel]], who is a wanted fugitive of the group.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Luminian Order]] is one of the four [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Luminian Order]] is a disciplined and organized group consisting of knights in silver and [[Pilgrims]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Luminian Order]] is supporting the [[Independents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Luminian Order]] has strict regulations on which [[Pilgrims]] can possess the full power of a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Andel]] is a wanted fugitive of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Luminian Order]]'s headquarters is in the greater [[Capital]] area.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian]] [[Order]] is a group responsible for the care of an [[Elder-touched madwoman]] and worked in conjunction with others to create sealing boxes. Acting on behalf of the [[Independent Guilds]], they provide open security from their headquarters, which is characterized by an [[aura]] of peace and tranquility. Founded by [[Loreli]], the first of their order, the group finds itself stretched thin following recent fighting. During this period, [[Darius Allbright]] assists them in coordinating the evacuation of the city.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian Order]] is the group caring for an [[Elder-touched madwoman]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian Order]] is providing open security on behalf of the [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The sealing boxes were created in conjunction with the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The headquarters of the [[Luminian Order]] carries an [[aura]] of peace and tranquility.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is the first of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Luminian Order]] is stretched thin following the fighting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]] helps the [[Luminian Order]] coordinate city evacuation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
